_note: This file is owned and controlled by the artist. The platform reads it. Nothing else.
_bio_note: 2-3 sentences shown on your hub page. Optional.
_photo_note: URL to a profile or press photo. Optional.
_fee_note: 2% covers Stripe passthrough and infra. Artist receives the rest.
_hub_note: Assigned at registration. Artist does not set this.
_active_note: Set to true when ready to go live.
_events_note: List your upcoming shows. Leave the array empty ([]) if none.
_related_note: Up to 10 artists you recommend to your fans. url = their hub or site, music_url = Bandcamp/SoundCloud for in-app playback.
